- Join the Contest of Mayors and advance along the Mayor’s Pass to unlock dazzling Vienna landmarks, including the magnificent Stephansdom.
- Collect Flower Coins and upgrade the grand Gasometer Complex into a stunning piece of modern revitalization.
- Stay tuned for new Events, Limited-Time Buildings, and special rewards throughout the season & create your own imperial masterpiece.

Happy building, Mayors!

title: Clash of Kings - CoK
notes:
Official Servers
Updates:
1. Returning Player Event
- Available in Kingdoms 1-2209, excluding 1537 and 2104. Transfer range: 1-2209.
- Lords who have not logged in for >14 days by 00:00 system time on June 30 will be considered Returning Lords.
- Invite inactive Lords back and bind with them as comrades during the Returning Recruitment event from July 1 to July 31. When a bound Returning Lord completes tasks, their bound Lord will receive generous rewards.

title: My Cat – Virtual Pet Games
notes:
This is a minor update with bug fixes and performance improvements, so we just wanted to use this space to wish you a glorious day, and send lots of love!
It would be really awesome if you rate us 5 stars! Also, feel free to share all your ideas and questions with us at info@appsyoulove.com. Your feedback is always helpful!

title: Fishdom Solitaire
notes:
Dive into an exciting Fishdom Solitaire update!

- New fish await in Season Adventures!
- New story events with your favorite characters!
- New levels

We wish you fun in spades!

title: Pokémon TCG Pocket
notes:
● New Pulsing Aura booster packs are now available.
● Gold frames have been added to flair.
● A Claim All feature has been added for packs.
● Updates to the Obtain Items feature.
● A 2D pattern code feature has been added for friend requests.
● Revisions have been made to some features.
